name: nested_choice_rollback
description: Choice count and choice index are correctly rolled back on nested choice failure
grammar:
S <- A / B
A <- 'x' INNER 'y'
B <- 'x' 'z'
INNER <- 'a' / 'b' / 'c'

name: sequence_direct_write
description: Sequence collects all child semantic values in order
grammar:
S <- A B C
A <- 'aaa'
B <- 'bbb'
C <- 'ccc'

name: predicate_no_side_effect
description: And-predicate succeeds but its semantic values do not leak into the parent

name: repetition_partial_rollback
description: Repetition collects only successfully matched items

name: capture_rollback_on_choice_failure
description: Backreference bindings from a failed choice alternative are discarded
